title: Molecular Biology & Genomics Lab
description: Equipped with PCR machines, gel electrophoresis systems, spectrophotometers, and a bioinformatics workstation cluster for genomic data analysis.

title: Embedded Systems & IoT Lab
description: Advanced prototyping facility featuring oscilloscopes, FPGA boards, Raspberry Pi clusters, and 5G-ready wireless testing equipment.

title: AI & High-Performance Computing Centre
description: GPU cluster (8× NVIDIA A100) for deep learning, NLP, and computer vision research, with access to 100TB shared research data storage.

title: Environmental Science Field Station
description: Field monitoring station with automated weather systems, water sampling rigs, soil analysis kits, and satellite imagery processing workstations.

title: Renewable Energy Testing Facility
description: 1.5 MW campus solar array serving as a live testbed, supplemented by wind turbine prototyping stations and battery storage R&D units.

title: Food Science & Nutrition Lab
description: Fully equipped for food quality analysis, nutritional profiling, and fermentation research, supporting agri-food innovation and public health studies.
